mapper.select: SELECT * FROM seat_reservation WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT * FROM seat_reservation WHERE seat_id = #{seatId} AND status IN ('PENDING', 'CHECKED_IN') AND deleted = 0 AND ( (start_time <= #{startTime} AND end_time > #{startTime}) OR (start_time < #{endTime} AND end_time >= #{endTime}) OR (start_time >= #{startTime} AND end_time <= #{endTime}) )

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM seat_reservation WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND reservation_date >= #{date} AND reservation_date < DATE_ADD(#{date}, INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND status IN ('PENDING', 'CHECKED_IN') AND deleted = 0
